What I Do

Areas of Expertise

🧱
Construction Materials Testing
ASTM-compliant lab and field testing of concrete, soils, and cementitious composites. Durability, strength, and combined deterioration mechanisms.
🔬
Geotechnical Engineering
Field construction inspection, deep and shallow foundations, earthwork monitoring, and soil mechanics applied to real infrastructure projects.
🐍
Python & Data Workflows
Custom Python tools for automating test data processing, analysis, and reporting — reducing manual effort and improving consistency across projects.
📊
Research & Technical Writing
Published researcher with peer-reviewed work on concrete materials. Experienced in conference presentations, novel test methodology development, and ASTM compliance.

Research

Technical Background

Doctoral Research · NJIT

Ph.D. research focused on the experimental investigation of concrete materials — specifically the durability and strength of cementitious composites under combined deterioration mechanisms. Developed novel ASTM-compliant and custom testing methodologies to characterize material behavior under real-world conditions.

Python Tools & Automation

Builds Python-based scripts and pipelines that automate data ingestion, statistical analysis, and report generation — turning hours of manual post-processing into consistent, reproducible outputs.
